message:
test(protocol): add metamorphic tests for RESP encoding invariants

Add 7 proptest-based metamorphic tests verifying algebraic properties:
- Encode-decode roundtrip identity
- Encoding determinism
- Bulk string length monotonicity
- Array length header correctness
- Sequence concatenation equivalence
- Integer ordering preservation
- Nested array depth preservation

500 cases per test with recursive frame generation up to depth 3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
